scope: PART2 §6.5 + §6.9 Security/Safety 검증 — 보안 항목 및 SDAR 보안 규칙

mismatches.fact: PART2 §6.5 lists Guardrails AI (L2) as '출력 검증, 구조화 출력'
mismatches.detail: D2.0-07 §1.1 defines L2 as 'Guardrails AI — 처리 단계에서 출력 품질·안전성 검증 (타입 검사, 범위 제한, 정책 위반 감지)'. PART2 simplifies this to '출력 검증, 구조화 출력', which is semantically similar but omits the '처리 단계' nuance — L2 is 처리 방어 (during processing), not purely 출력 검증.

PART2 counts 15 security items (S7E 14 + DEC-003 1). D2.0-07 covers far more S7E items (92 in Part E across multiple sections). The 15 is PART2's implementation-scoped subset for V1/V2 CRITICAL items, not a mismatch per se, but the presentation as 'all security items' could be misleading. It correctly notes source as READINESS_REVIEW §9.

match_details.detail: 4-Layer progression with V2=3, V3=4 matches correctly
Default role OWNER matches (was corrected from OPERATOR in v10.0.0)

match_details.fact: P2 세션 종료 시 자동 OFF (LOCK: Option A)
match_details.detail: P2 auto-OFF on session end matches

match_details.fact: 승인 타임아웃: 일반 10분 / HITL 고위험 P2 = 5분
Docker 코드 샌드박스: 네트워크 격리, 30초 타임아웃

match_details.detail: Encryption standard consistent with SOT goal
All 7 Non-goals match exactly between PART2 and D2.0-07 §1

match_details.fact: DEC-003 도구 승인 Allowlist: 읽기전용=자동, 외부API/쓰기/코드실행=확인
OWASP Top 10 for LLM 전 항목 대응 매핑
match_details.detail: S7E-003 OWASP coverage is referenced in SOT and PART2 security section

match_details.fact: Autonomy 레벨 L0~L3: L0=manual, L1=assisted, L2=auto, L3=full
Prompt Injection 방어: 직접/간접/패턴 기반/문맥 기반

missing.sot_fact: D2.0-07 S7E-003 OWASP LLM08 대응: 5-Gate System + Autonomy Level로 Excessive Agency 방지
missing.detail: PART2 §6.5 lists Autonomy Level (L2586) and 5-Gate system throughout, but does not explicitly map them to OWASP LLM08 Excessive Agency defense as D2.0-07 does.

missing.sot_fact: D2.0-07 S7E-011 Instruction Hierarchy: L0(Core Constitution) > L1(System Prompt) > L2(User) > L3(Tool/Doc) > L4(History)
missing.detail: PART2 does not include the 5-level Instruction Hierarchy (L0~L4) from S7E-011 which is CRITICAL priority for V1. This prompt priority system is important for injection defense.

missing.sot_fact: D2.0-07 §2.3.4 외부 통신 보안: HTTPS(TLS 1.2+) 만 허용, 응답 스키마 대조
missing.detail: PART2 mentions TLS in MCP context but does not explicitly state the §2.3.4 requirement that ALL external API calls must use HTTPS(TLS 1.2+) only, with response schema validation.

check_details.detail: PART2 L1868-1870 lists layers in correct order
PART2 repeatedly states Gate 우회 불가

check_details.sot_fact: 7개 불변 구역: safety_rules, cost_ceiling, approval_flow, non_goals, audit_format, data_retention, user_consent
check_details.detail: PART2 L2868 NEVER list includes all 7 + 3 operational
Not explicitly in §6.5 list but is a V1 CRITICAL item in S7E

check_details.sot_fact: S7E-004 Supply Chain 보안 (npm audit, pip-audit)
check_details.detail: PART2 L1459 mentions pip-audit, cargo-audit, npm audit
Community skill security verification 4-step process not included in PART2
Detailed prompt injection classification table not in PART2
PART2 covers cost blocking behavior but not the full 4-trigger COST_APPROVAL workflow table

check_details.sot_fact: 멀티에이전트 비용 15배 경고: 싱글 대비 3배 초과 시 자동 경고
check_details.detail: Multi-agent cost 15x warning and 3x auto-alert not in PART2

findings.description: S7E-011 Instruction Hierarchy (5-level prompt priority L0~L4) is CRITICAL V1 item in D2.0-07 but not reflected in PART2. This is essential for prompt injection defense.
findings.evidence: D2.0-07 S7E-011: L0(Core Constitution) > L1(System Prompt) > L2(User) > L3(Tool/Doc) > L4(History) — not in PART2

findings.description: Guardrails L2 역할 표현 차이: PART2 '출력 검증' vs D2.0-07 '처리 단계 검증'. L2는 처리 중(during processing) 검증이 핵심이나, PART2는 출력 검증으로 축약.
findings.evidence: PART2 L2582: 'Guardrails AI (L2) | 출력 검증' vs D2.0-07 §1.1: '2층 — 처리 방어: Guardrails AI'

findings.description: 멀티에이전트 비용 15배 경고 규칙 누락. D2.0-07 §4.3.2에서 싱글 대비 3배 초과 시 자동 경고 발생 규칙이 PART2에 반영되지 않음.
findings.evidence: D2.0-07 §4.3.2: 'I-9 Cost Gate에서 멀티 에이전트 태스크의 비용을 싱글 대비 모니터링하고, 3배 초과 시 자동 경고'

findings.description: 커뮤니티 스킬 보안 검증 4단계 프로세스가 PART2에 누락됨.
